description: Retrieve a list of all cities that have airports in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of city names; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: List all airports located in a specific city in LightFlight.

city.description: The name of the city to query for airports.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of airport names in that city; on failure (e.g., city not found), output contains an error message.

description: Get detailed information about a specific flight in LightFlight using its unique flight ID (FID).

fid.description: The unique flight ID (FID) of the flight to retrieve details for.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output includes departure/arrival cities and airports, times, duration, prices by class, and seat availability; on failure (e.g., invalid FID), output contains an error message.

description: Search for available flights between two cities on a specific date in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of matching flight IDs (FIDs); on failure (e.g., no flights or invalid date), output contains an error message.

description: Check the number of remaining seats for a specific cabin class on a given flight in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output states the number of remaining seats; on failure (e.g., invalid FID or class), output contains an error message.

description: List all passengers currently registered in your LightFlight profile.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of passenger records (name and optional LightTalk UID); on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Add a new passenger to your LightFlight profile for booking purposes.

name.description: The full name of the passenger.

light_talk_uid.description: Optional LightTalk user ID associated with this passenger (can be any string, including 'empty').

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the passenger was added and includes their index; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Remove a passenger from your LightFlight profile by their index.

passenger_idx.description: The zero-based index of the passenger to remove.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms removal; on failure (e.g., index out of range), output contains an error message.

description: Add a flight seat for a specific passenger to your current booking cart in LightFlight.

passenger_idx.description: The index of the passenger (from your passenger list) to book for.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the booking item was added; on failure (e.g., no seats, invalid passenger), output contains an error message.

description: View all flight bookings currently in your cart (both paid and unpaid) in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of booking items with flight, class, passenger, price, and payment status; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Remove an unpaid booking item from your cart using its booking ID (BID) in LightFlight.

bid.description: The unique booking ID (BID) of the item to remove.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms removal; on failure (e.g., BID not found or already paid), output contains an error message.

description: Prompt the user to enter their payment password in LightFlight. This step is required before checkout.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms authentication is complete; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Complete payment for all unpaid bookings in your cart in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms successful checkout and updates balance/history; on failure (e.g., password not entered or insufficient balance), output contains an error message.

description: Check your current account balance in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is your current balance (e.g., '$ 12345'); on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve your historical flight booking records in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of past booking records with timestamps, total prices, and flight details; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Cancel one or more paid bookings and receive a 95% refund in LightFlight.

bids.description: A list of booking IDs (BIDs) to cancel. All must be paid.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms cancellation and refund amount; on failure (e.g., unpaid booking or invalid BID), output contains an error message.

description: Search for airports by name (partial match) in LightFlight.

airport_name.description: The airport name or partial name to search for.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of matching airports with ID, name, city, and code; on failure (e.g., no matches), output contains an error message.

description: Mark an airport as starred (favorited) in LightFlight for quick access.

aid.description: The unique airport ID (AID) to star.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the airport was starred; on failure (e.g., already starred or invalid AID), output contains an error message.

description: Remove an airport from your starred list in LightFlight.

aid.description: The unique airport ID (AID) to unstar.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the airport was unstarred; on failure (e.g., not previously starred), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve a list of all airports you have starred in LightFlight.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of starred airports with ID, name, city, and code; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve all flight IDs (FIDs) that arrive at a specific destination city in LightFlight.

arrival.description: The name of the destination city to query for arriving flights.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of flight IDs (FIDs) arriving at the specified city; on failure (e.g., city not found), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve all flight IDs (FIDs) that depart from a specific origin city in LightFlight.

departure.description: The name of the origin city to query for departing flights.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of flight IDs (FIDs) departing from the specified city; on failure (e.g., city not found), output contains an error message.
